description: Brazilian criminal organization based in Porto Alegre, Rio Grande do Sul, founded in the early 2000s. Known for extreme violence, including executions with multiple shots to the face. Engages in drug trafficking, robberies, and murders. Allied with Comando Vermelho and active in southern Brazil, Uruguay, and Argentina.

country_links.evidence_quote: Território(s): Rio Grande do Sul, Santa Catarina , Uruguai , Argentina
country_links.context: The organization has territory in Argentina.
